# `run-internal` for [default](/commands/categories/default.md)

<div class='command-title'>Run a built-in command by name. Used internally by `%($cmd)` dynamic dispatch.</div>

## Signature

```> run-internal {flags} (name) ...rest```

## Parameters

 -  `name`: The name of the built-in command to run.
 -  `...rest`: Arguments to pass to the built-in command.


## Input/output types:

| input | output |
| ----- | ------ |
| any   | any    |
